title: Bye Bye Bye
why_this_song: Future tense assertion + negation ('I don't really want to') — A2 drill on contrasting statements and farewell vocabulary.
grammar_callouts: negation: I don't want to be

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: "Bye Bye Bye" was released in 2000. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Bye Bye Bye" foi lançada em 2000. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fool" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "fool" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Now, girl you're more than welcome to
I don't wanna be your fool

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Farewell vocabulary is pragmatically important. Contrast 'bye', 'goodbye', 'see you', 'take care'.

lines: (Bye, bye) I don't want to be a fool for you
Just another player in your game for two
You may hate me but it ain't no lie
